headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -52.0)
key_insights: Fears trending up 47% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Optimism dominates today despite a negative score of -44.0, driven by 70 quotes but weighed down by 17 mild-intensity quotes and relatively few strong ones (18), pulling the score further negative than yesterday.
• At -44.0, optimism is trending toward the lower end of its 177-day range (-65.4 to 22.8), while frustrations remain elevated at 30.1 despite dropping sharply from yesterday's 68.7 — still buoyed by an unusually high 103 strong-intensity quotes.
• Fears are the quietest story today at -22.1, edging up slightly from yesterday's -25.4 but still well below the midpoint of their historical range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
